Package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a

package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan
     
    org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a.enums

  • Class
    Description
    ChMed16AEMediplan<M extends ChMed16AMedicament>
    This is the main eMediplan object, called Medication in CHMED16A specification.
    ChMed16AExtendable
    Interface for objects that contain extensions.
    ChMed16AExtendedPostalAddress
    This is the postal address object used for the ePrescription backport of HealthcareOrganization, which includes the country code, while the vanilla CHMED16A does not.
    ChMed16AExtension
    Extensions can be used to include additional information within an eMediplan that is not explicitly modelled by the ChMed specification.
    ChMed16AHealthcareOrganization
    The model for a healthcare organization, to which the healthcare person belongs.
    ChMed16AHealthcarePerson
     
    ChMed16AMedicament
    Information about a medication as well as its dosage.
    ChMed16APatient
     
    ChMed16APatientId
     
    ChMed16APatientMedicalData
     
    ChMed16APatientMedicalDataMeasurement
     
    ChMed16APostalAddress
    A postal address.
    ChMed16ARecommendation
    Model of a polymedication check recommendation.
    EPrescription
    Model according to the specifications of eMediplan in the context of ePrescription.
    EPrescriptionMedicament
    Extension of the ChMed16AMedicament for the revision 3 of the CHMED16A ePrescription format.
